hero.tagline: Fine Jewelry in the Heart of Skopje
hero.subtitle: Handcrafted pieces that tell your story

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Biser Gold — Crafting Beauty Since 2000
about.text1: Nestled in the heart of Skopje, North Macedonia, Biser Gold is a testament to timeless craftsmanship and refined elegance. Each piece in our collection is thoughtfully designed to celebrate life's most precious moments.
about.text2: From delicate gold necklaces to statement rings, our artisans pour passion and precision into every creation — making jewelry that becomes part of your story.

collections.title: Our Collections
collections.subtitle: Discover pieces crafted with passion
collections.inquiry_text: Did you see a piece somewhere and wonder if we have it — or can find it? Send us a photo or description and we'll do our best.

about_page.hero_sub: Since 2000, in the heart of Skopje's Old Bazaar
about_page.story_p1: Biser Gold is more than a jewelry store — it's a family legacy. Founded in 2000 by the Biser family, our shop sits at the heart of Skopje's historic Old Bazaar (Çarşıa), surrounded by centuries-old cobblestones and living tradition.
about_page.story_p2: Every piece we offer is carefully chosen or crafted, with an artisan's eye and a family's heart. We work with 18k and 24k gold, natural diamonds and precious stones, blending traditional techniques with a contemporary touch.
about_page.story_p3: Our customers are not just buyers — they become part of our story. Many trust us with life's most important moments: engagements, weddings, births, love.
about_page.v1_text: Over 20 years of expertise passed down through generations, with passion and dedication.
about_page.v2_text: Only certified gold, natural diamonds and first-class materials.
about_page.v3_text: We help you find or create the perfect piece — tailored to your wishes.
about_page.v4_text: Thousands of happy customers have trusted us with their most precious moments.
about_page.gallery_title: Visit us in the Old Bazaar
